<!--
Thanks for reporting a bug! The more detail you give, the faster it gets fixed.
If you plan to fix this yourself, open this issue first, then reference it from
your pull request with "Closes #<this issue number>".
-->

## What happened?

<!-- A clear, short description of the bug. -->

<!-- Exact steps so anyone can see the bug too. -->

2.
3.

## What did you expect to happen?

<!-- What you expected instead. -->

## Screenshot or screen recording

<!-- Drag an image or video here showing what happened. This helps a lot. -->

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| Browser + version | e.g. Chrome 126 |
| Operating system | e.g. macOS 15.5 / Windows 11 |
| Why Am I Here? version | e.g. 1.2.0 |

## Anything else?

<!-- Console errors, extension logs, or other context. -->

## Before submitting

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I'm on the latest version of Why Am I Here?
- [ ] I included clear step-by-step instructions to reproduce
- [ ] I attached a screenshot or recording of what happened
- [ ] I filled in the environment table (browser, OS, version)
